Package index

Standings & seeding

Compute standings, conference ranks and champions, and CFP seeds.

cfb_standings()
Compute College Football Standings
cfb_playoff_seeds()
Compute College Football Playoff Seeds

Season simulation

Simulate seasons week by week with a pluggable results generator.

cfb_simulations()
Simulate a College Football Season
cfbseedR_compute_results()
Compute CFB Game Results in Season Simulations
simulations_verify_fct()
Verify a Custom CFB Result Simulation Function

Data preparation

Map real schedules into the engine games schema.

cfb_games_from_schedule()
Build an Engine Games Table from a cfbfastR Schedule

On this page
